creator: ben@lavery-griffiths.com
text:
Created attachment 178456
svn diff to upgrade to 0.18.1

gohugo has been updated to 0.18.1 (https://github.com/spf13/hugo/releases/tag/v0.18.1)

The attached svn diff brings this port up from 0.17 to 0.18.1

Tested against 10.3-RELEASE and 11.0-RELEASE, no issues building manually/poudriere. Poudriere logs attached.


root@freebsd-11:~/gohugo # portlint -AC
looks fine.
